base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_igor_hop — a character (boss) from 1986 castlevania. Hunchback Igor — 2-frame hop. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Hunchback Igor — 2-frame hop; accompanies Frankenstein at Level 4 boss fight, jumps around throwing orbs. Smaller secondary boss enemy
